---
title: "Homework 1 - Key"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
author: Instructional staff
---

## Task 1 - Write a function

### Write up

Placeholder write up: the function returns its input unchanged, which satisfies the behavior specified in the task description.

### Function

```{r task1}
placeholder = function(x) {
  x
}
```

### Example Usage

```{r task1_examples}
placeholder(1:5)
placeholder("placeholder text")
```


## Task 2 - Extend the function

### Write up

Placeholder write up: the extension adds a `reverse` argument that reverses the input before returning it.

### Function

```{r task2}
placeholder_ext = function(x, reverse = FALSE) {
  if (reverse) rev(x) else x
}
```

### Example Usage

```{r task2_examples}
placeholder_ext(1:5)
placeholder_ext(1:5, reverse = TRUE)
```


## Task 3 - Summarize your results

### Write up

Placeholder write up: a short summary of the results from the first two tasks.

### Code

```{r task3}
summary(placeholder(1:10))
```
